s=14830741-930275 l=D/I f=nil D={z,m;A,l}v[C[-855736+855737]]=D z=nil m=nil A=nil l=nil end end end end end end end s=#V return N(i)end,{},{}return(f(780354+-237672,{}))(N(i))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[d(790432-728149)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
